SEGA shipped Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition on Nintendo Switch 2 recently following various leaks, and Digital Foundry is now offering up new technical details with information about frame rate, resolution, and more. text:
Cruis’n Blast has been delisted from the Nintendo Switch eShop

Out of nowhere, Cruis’n Blast has been delisted from the Nintendo eShop. As far as we’re aware, the arcade racer has been available since launching on Nintendo Switch almost five years ago. Unfortunately, that’s no longer the case as of today. Looking the game up on the Nintendo eShop now provides zero results. We checked both the North American store...

text:
Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition Nintendo Switch 2 physical release announced, standard and collector’s edition versions

Limited Run Games today unveiled the latest physical release for its Nintendo Switch 2 lineup, which is for Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition. The title will be sold as part of a standard copy and a collector’s edition. Both versions come with the full game on the cartridge and a booklet. The collector’s edition features the following: Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo may be retiring the Nintendo Power brand

According to a report from Nintendo World Report, Nintendo may be quietly retiring the Nintendo Power brand. The speculation comes after Boston America, the company behind the officially licensed Nintendo Power Mints, began replacing the product with the new Nintendo Entertainment System Controller Mints. Nintendo World Report reached out to Boston America to ask about the change. The company reportedly...

The post Nintendo may be retiring the Nintendo Power brand appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Banjo-Kazooie unreleased music tracks discovered

Last week, Rare released a handheld version of Banjo-Kazooie as part of the HyperMegaTech Super Pocket Rare Edition. Alongside the various adjustments made for the Nintendo 64 classic, fans quickly noticed an unexpected bonus. After completing the game, players can unlock a new music player featuring more than 20 previously unused “beta” tracks that never made it into the original...

text:
The Elder Scrolls 4: Oblivion Remastered details frame rate and resolution for Nintendo Switch 2, DLSS support, mouse controls, more

We’re continuing to get details about The Elder Scrolls 4: Oblivion Remastered on Nintendo Switch 2, and frame rate and resolution have now been confirmed. If you’re wondering about frame rate, Bethesda says that the game will run at 30 FPS. This applies to both docked and handheld modes. For resolution, when docked, the game runs at 1080p. Handheld play...

text:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie announces streaming release date

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has already been in theaters and has seen its digital launch, but we now have confirmation about the streaming release date. This is happening on July 30, 2026. You’ll need a Peacock subscription in order to watch the film. It’s just like The Super Mario Bros. Movie, as that one debuted on Peacock as well....

The post The Super Mario Galaxy Movie announces streaming release date appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Splatoon Raiders multiplayer features detailed

Splatoon Raiders has largely been promoted as a single-player game, but multiplayer features are included. Nintendo explained how everything works during the Direct presentation today.
